use_cases: Displaying frequently asked questions with expandable answer panels
Providing searchable FAQ sections for product documentation or support pages
Adding interactive Q&A sections to landing pages with animated background effects
Creating visually engaging help center interfaces with gradient spiral decorations
Enabling users to filter and find relevant answers quickly through search
ai_summary: An animated FAQ section component featuring expandable accordion panels for questions and answers, enhanced with a configurable spiral dot animation background in the center. Includes search functionality to filter FAQ items by keywords, making it ideal for landing pages, product documentation, or support centers that need to present information in an engaging, interactive format.
